About Me

Turning Data into Strategic Decisions

I'm a BI Developer and Data Analyst based in Giza, Egypt, with a Bachelor's in Computer Science from Cairo University — Faculty of Computers and Artificial Intelligence (FCAI), one of Egypt's most prestigious faculties for computing and technology.

Currently gaining hands-on experience as a Business Intelligence Intern at the Egyptian Food Bank, where I work with the Microsoft Power Platform at scale — processing over 1M+ records per month and enabling executives to identify 20% cost optimization opportunities.

"My passion lies at the intersection of engineering and storytelling — taking thousands of rows of messy data and extracting the one insight that changes how a business operates."

I build dashboards executives actually use, not just ones that look nice. From designing Medallion Architecture ETL pipelines to building drag-and-drop Power Apps for order management, I bring both the technical depth and the design sensibility needed to deliver complete, production-ready solutions.

My program at FCAI covered a rigorous curriculum spanning data systems, algorithms, databases, software engineering, and artificial intelligence — giving me a strong academic foundation that directly powers my work in Business Intelligence.

Experience

Professional Journey

Real-world impact through data engineering, dashboard development, and workflow automation.

Apr 2026 — Present
Business Intelligence Developer Intern
🏛️ Egyptian Food Bank · Cairo, Egypt
Current
  • Developed a Freemart Performance Dashboard analyzing Feb 2026 data across 10+ branches, implementing 15+ custom DAX measures — reducing reporting time by 40%.
  • Architected a Finance & Revenue Analysis Dashboard with 35+ KPIs enabling executives to identify 20% cost optimization opportunities.
  • Designed Order Management Apps using Power Apps + SharePoint with zero-downtime backend scalability for high-volume transactional data.
  • Automated Client Communication Flows via Power Automate — cutting processing time from 15 min to under 2 min per order (30% admin reduction).
  • Queried relational datasets from SQL Server across 10+ normalized tables, ensuring 99% data accuracy for executive financial reporting.

HealthCare Analytics Dashboard
Comprehensive, interactive Power BI dashboard analyzing healthcare facility data across 3 views — Overview, Clinical, and Financial — turning complex hospital metrics into actionable insights.
